meaning: n.一种原东德 Meissen 出产的瓷器
examples: The Fair in Leipzig and fine porcelain in Meissen are well known around the world.
Mrs Astor was as small, delicate and fine as a Meissen cup, her tailoring exquisite and her jewels unobtrusive.
FOR centuries raising your hand was the way you bid at auction, whether you were buying sheep or Meissen shepherdesses.
Try that with a piece of Meissen.
